channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-18 05:55 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink works 5 mins after you receive it
item.description: Starlink works 5 mins after you receive it

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 is still an early beta that will improve almost every day, but try it out! We will publish ...
item.description: Grok 4.3 is still an early beta that will improve almost every day, but try it out! We will publish release notes as we fix bugs and add functionality.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 just leveled up — it can create slides. 🚀📊
item.description: Grok 4.3 just leveled up — it can create slides. 🚀📊

item.title: @elonmusk: Here we go... Grok 4.3 just dropped. Now it can create other file formats like Slides, Sheets, PDFs,...
item.description: Here we go... Grok 4.3 just dropped. Now it can create other file formats like Slides, Sheets, PDFs, Docs, etc.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla engineering redesigned lithium refining from physics first principles
item.description: Tesla engineering redesigned lithium refining from physics first principles

item.title: @elonmusk: We launched our new Grok Voice APIs and they’re extremely good. Strongly suggest giving them a try.
item.description: We launched our new Grok Voice APIs and they’re extremely good. Strongly suggest giving them a try.

item.title: @elonmusk: grok speech-to-text and tts apis are out. multilingual multi-speaker is huge for me personally.x.ai/...
item.description: grok speech-to-text and tts apis are out. multilingual multi-speaker is huge for me personally.x.ai/news/grok-stt-and-tts-a…

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI just made Speech to Text generally available. 25 languages. batch uploads + live streaming. word...
item.description: xAI just made Speech to Text generally available. 25 languages. batch uploads + live streaming. word-level timestamps. multichannel audio. speaker diarization. check out the Speech to Text docs. 👇

item.title: @elonmusk: "People get confused sometimes they think an economy is money. Money is a database for exchange of g...
item.description: "People get confused sometimes they think an economy is money. Money is a database for exchange of goods & services. Money doesn't have power in & of itself. The actual economy is goods & services" 一 Elon Musk

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 Beta browser os test result, gta clone and voice control apps
item.description: Grok 4.3 Beta browser os test result, gta clone and voice control apps

item.title: @elonmusk: FSD is shockingly good, I am completely gobsmacked.@Teslateam, bravo, truly. My god. First drive in ...
item.description: FSD is shockingly good, I am completely gobsmacked.@Teslateam, bravo, truly. My god. First drive in Amsterdam after 5 years on autopilot.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 TRUMP CALLS OUT GENOCIDE IN SOUTH AFRICA “In South Africa there’s a very horrible thing going on… ...
item.description: 🚨 TRUMP CALLS OUT GENOCIDE IN SOUTH AFRICA “In South Africa there’s a very horrible thing going on… it’s a genocide, it’s a horrible thing… they kill people if they’re white.” Time for sanctions!

item.title: @elonmusk: A 93 year old lady filmed her Tesla FSD taking her to church and her joy is the most wholesome conte...
item.description: A 93 year old lady filmed her Tesla FSD taking her to church and her joy is the most wholesome content on the internet. Her take on Grok: "I love that lady."

item.title: @elonmusk: För många år sedan så var jag en av de få journalister som rapporterade om våldtäkt krisen i Sverige...
item.description: För många år sedan så var jag en av de få journalister som rapporterade om våldtäkt krisen i Sverige. Media kallade mig för "höger extrem" som belysade detta problem. Nu har det blivit så illa i vårt land att det har varit 58 053 rapporterade våldtäkter från 2020 till 2025.

item.title: @elonmusk: Universal HIGH INCOME via checks issued by the Federal government is the best way to deal with unemp...
item.description: Universal HIGH INCOME via checks issued by the Federal government is the best way to deal with unemployment caused by AI. AI/robotics will produce goods & services far in excess of the increase in the money supply, so there will not be inflation.
